title: JOYIN 5 Halloween Spider Web Plastic Basket Bowls for Halloween Trick or Treat Hand Grabbing Candy Holder Bowls, Truck or Treat Spider Web Party Supplies Decoration
features: 🎃COMPREHENSIVE SET. Spider Web basket includes 5 pieces of bowls that come in 3 different colors, 2 Halloween Orange, 2 Halloween Purple, 1 Versatile Black.

🦇REAL FUNCTION. It is time to be spooky! Put these Spider Web bowls on your table and fill them with lots of sweet treats for kids and for the trick-or-treaters. Kids can also bring these bowls and put in their candies as they go trick-or-treating around the neighborhood. Use these baskets as fruit holders or candy holders during your Halloween party to spice up your decorations.
💀ENDLESS FUN. This Halloween Candy Bowl provides an added spooky atmosphere to your Halloween party! This is perfect for Halloween parties, trick-or-treating, and Halloween party decorations.
🕷PREMIUM QUALITY. Safe for children and Non-Toxic. Meet the US toy standard. Safety test approved.

🎃EXCEPTIONAL CARE: We pay attention to the small details. That's why customer safety and satisfaction are at the heart of everything we do. Contact us if products don't meet your expectations. We anticipate ensuring every moment brings you joy.
